tvayā vyāptam idaṃ viśvaṃ tvayi protaṃ yathārthataḥ idaṃ+viśvaṃ · sākāram anṛtaṃ viddhi nirākāraṃ tu niścalam anṛtaṃ+viddhi · ātmano na tathā bhinnaṃ viśvam ātmavinirgatam bhinnaṃ+viśvam · ātmatanmatram evedaṃ tadvad viśvaṃ vicāritam viśvaṃ+vicāritam

nityaṃ nirantaraṃ brahma sarvabhūtagaṇe tathā nityaṃ+nirantaraṃ · tathā viśvaṃ mayi kﾱptaṃ mayā vyāptaṃ nirantaram vyāptaṃ+nirantaram · aho ahaṃ namo mahyaṃ vināśo yasya nāsti me ahaṃ+namo · aho ahaṃ namo mahyaṃ eko 'haṃ dehavān api ahaṃ+namo

asaṅgo 'si nirākāro viśvasākṣī sukhī bhava asaṅgo+'si · dehābhimānapāśena ciraṃ baddho 'si putraka baddho+'si · niḥsaṅgo niṣkriyo 'si tvaṃ svaprakāśo nirañjanaḥ niṣkriyo+'si · ajñānād bhāti yatredaṃ so 'ham asmi nirañjanaḥ so+'ham

eṣāṃ sākṣiṇam ātmānaṃ cidrūpaṃ viddhi muktaye eṣāṃ+sākṣiṇam · ānandaparamānandaḥ sa bodhas tvaṃ sukhaṃ cara tvaṃ+sukhaṃ · viśvaṃ sphurati yatredaṃ taraṅgā iva sāgare viśvaṃ+sphurati · ceṣṭamānaṃ śarīraṃ svaṃ paśyaty anyaśarīravat śarīraṃ+svaṃ

brahmādistambaparyantaṃ jagannāśe 'pi tiṣṭhataḥ nāśe+'pi · aho janasamūhe 'pi na dvaitaṃ paśyato mama samūhe+'pi · āsthitaḥ paramādvaitaṃ mokṣārthe 'pi vyavasthitaḥ arthe+'pi · niḥspṛhaṃ mānasaṃ yasya nairāśye 'pi mahātmanaḥ nairāśye+'pi

kathaṃ jñānam avāpnoti kathaṃ muktir bhaviṣyati kathaṃ+muktir · dharmādharmau sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ mānasāni na te vibho duḥkhaṃ+mānasāni · ābhāso 'haṃ bhramaṃ muktvā bhāvaṃ bāhyam athāntaraṃ bhramaṃ+muktvā · śuddhabuddhasvarūpas tvaṃ mā gamaḥ kṣudracittatām tvaṃ+mā

matto vinirgataṃ viśvaṃ mayy eva layam eṣyati matto+vinirgataṃ · na me bandho 'sti mokṣo vā bhrāntiḥ śāntā nirāśrayā mokṣo+vā · abhāgyāj jīvavaṇijo jagat poto vinaśvaraḥ poto+vinaśvaraḥ · udeti bhavato viśvaṃ vāridher iva budbudaḥ bhavato+viśvaṃ

eko draṣṭāsi sarvasya muktaprāyo 'si sarvadā prāyaḥ+'si · eko viśuddhabodho 'ham iti niścayavahninā bodhaḥ+'ham · dṛśyam etan mṛṣā sarvaṃ eko 'haṃ cidraso 'malaḥ rasaḥ+'malaḥ · bodhamātro 'ham ajñānād upadhiḥ kalpito mayā mātraḥ+'ham

vairāgyaṃ ca kathaṃ prāptam etad brūhi mama prabho vairāgyaṃ+ca · ānandaparamānandaḥ sa bodhas tvaṃ sukhaṃ cara sukhaṃ+cara · asaṃspṛśya śarīreṇa yena viśvaṃ ciraṃ dhṛtam viśvaṃ+ciraṃ · acintyaṃ cintyamāno 'pi cintārūpaṃ bhajaty asau acintyaṃ+cintyamāno

ātmā sākṣī vibhuḥ pūrṇa eko muktaś cid akriyaḥ eko+muktaś · prakāśo me nijaṃ rūpaṃ nātirikto 'smy ahaṃ tataḥ prakāśo+me · aho ahaṃ namo mahyaṃ vināśo yasya nāsti me namo+mahyaṃ · aho ahaṃ namo mahyaṃ eko 'haṃ dehavān api namo+mahyaṃ

tantumātro bhaved eva paṭo yadvad vicāritaḥ paṭo+yadvad · aho ahaṃ namo mahyaṃ vināśo yasya nāsti me vināśo+yasya · śukter ajñānato lobho yathā rajatavibhrame lobho+yathā · aho tatra sthito yogī na harṣam upagacchati sthito+yogī

ātmā sākṣī vibhuḥ pūrṇa eko muktaś cid akriyaḥ pūrṇa+eko · yadā prakāśate viśvaṃ tadāham bhāsa eva hi bhāsa+eva · atiśānto nirākāra etad evāham āsthitaḥ nirākāra+etad · ity asakto 'spṛhaḥ śānta etad evāham āsthitaḥ śānta+etad

eko draṣṭāsi sarvasya muktaprāyo 'si sarvadā eko+draṣṭāsi · ayam eva hi te bandho draṣṭāraṃ paśyasītaram bandho+draṣṭāraṃ · yathā prakāśayāmy eko deham enaṃ tathā jagat eko+deham · svabhāvād eva jānāno dṛśyam etan na kiṃcana jānāno+dṛśyam

ātmā sākṣī vibhuḥ pūrṇa eko muktaś cid akriyaḥ cid+akriyaḥ · abhāvād adya he brahmann evam evāham āsthitaḥ abhāvād+adya · evam eva kṛtaṃ yena sa kṛtārtho bhaved asau bhaved+asau · evam eva svabhāvo yaḥ sa kṛtārtho bhaved asau bhaved+asau

śūnyā dṛṣṭir vṛthā ceṣṭā vikalānīndriyāṇi ca dṛṣṭir+vṛthā · na spṛhā na viraktir vā kṣīṇasaṃsārasāgare viraktir+vā · bhikṣur vā bhūpatir vāpi yo niṣkāmaḥ sa śobhate bhikṣur+vā · kva svapnaḥ kva suṣuptir vā kva ca jāgaraṇaṃ tathā suṣuptir+vā

dharmādharmau sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ mānasāni na te vibho sukhaṃ+duḥkhaṃ · so 'ham asmīti vijñāya kiṃ dīna iva dhāvasi kiṃ+dīna · na tvaṃ deho na te deho bhoktā kartā na vā bhavān tvaṃ+deho · sānurāgāṃ striyaṃ dṛṣṭvā mṛtyuṃ vā samupasthitam striyaṃ+dṛṣṭvā

ābhāso 'haṃ bhramaṃ muktvā bhāvaṃ bāhyam athāntaraṃ ābhāso+'haṃ · bodho 'haṃ jñānakhaḍgena tan niṣkṛtya sukhī bhava bodho+'haṃ · aho nirañjanaḥ śānto bodho 'haṃ prakṛteḥ paraḥ bodho+'haṃ · aho ahaṃ namo mahyaṃ eko 'haṃ dehavān api eko+'haṃ

na pṛthvī na jalaṃ nāgnir na vāyur dyaur na vā bhavān dyaur+na · udetu vastam āyātu na me vṛddhir na ca kṣatiḥ vṛddhir+na · udetu vāstam āyātu na te vṛddhir na vā kṣatiḥ vṛddhir+na · asamādher avikṣepān na mumukṣur na cetaraḥ mumukṣur+na

asaṅgo nispṛhaḥ śānto bhramāt saṃsāravān iva śānto+bhramāt · evam eva kṛtaṃ yena sa kṛtārtho bhaved asau kṛtārtho+bhaved · evam eva svabhāvo yaḥ sa kṛtārtho bhaved asau kṛtārtho+bhaved · na tvaṃ deho na te deho bhoktā kartā na vā bhavān deho+bhoktā

kūṭasthaṃ bodham advaitam ātmānaṃ paribhāvaya kūṭasthaṃ+bodham · ābhāso 'haṃ bhramaṃ muktvā bhāvaṃ bāhyam athāntaraṃ bhāvaṃ+bāhyam · dehābhimānapāśena ciraṃ baddho 'si putraka ciraṃ+baddho · nityaṃ nirantaraṃ brahma sarvabhūtagaṇe tathā nirantaraṃ+brahma

araṇyam iva saṃvṛttaṃ kva ratiṃ karavāṇy aham karavāṇy+aham · tajjñasya puṇyapāpābhyāṃ sparśo hy antar na jāyate hy+antar · kaivalyam iva samprāpto na smaraty akṛtaṃ kṛtam smaraty+akṛtaṃ · acintyaṃ cintyamāno 'pi cintārūpaṃ bhajaty asau bhajaty+asau

tattyāgo vāsanātyāgāt sthitir adya yathā tathā sthitir+adya · bubhukṣur iha saṃsāre mumukṣur api dṛśyate mumukṣur+api · asamādher avikṣepān na mumukṣur na cetaraḥ asamādher+avikṣepān · ekāgratā nirodho vā mūḍhair abhyasyate bhṛśam mūḍhair+abhyasyate

muktābhimānī mukto hi baddho baddhābhimāny api mukto+hi · tajjñasya puṇyapāpābhyāṃ sparśo hy antar na jāyate sparśo+hy · bhogamokṣanirākāṅkṣī viralo hi mahāśayaḥ viralo+hi · iti vijñāya dhīro hi kim abhyasyati bālavat dhīro+hi

aho nirañjanaḥ śānto bodho 'haṃ prakṛteḥ paraḥ śānto+bodho · nāhaṃ deho na me deho bodho 'ham iti niścayī deho+bodho · nidrito bodhita iva kṣīṇasaṃsmaraṇo hi saḥ nidrito+bodhita · karoti tattvabodho 'yam atas tyakto bubhukṣubhiḥ tyakto+bubhukṣubhiḥ

kathaṃ jñānam avāpnoti kathaṃ muktir bhaviṣyati kathaṃ+jñānam · jñānaṃ jñeyaṃ tathā jñātā tritayaṃ nāsti vāstavam jñānaṃ+jñeyaṃ · ātmaivedaṃ jagat sarvaṃ jñātaṃ yena mahātmanā sarvaṃ+jñātaṃ · ākāśavad ananto 'haṃ ghaṭavat prakṛtaṃ jagat prakṛtaṃ+jagat

yatra viśvam idaṃ bhāti kalpitaṃ rajjusarpavat idaṃ+bhāti · sukhādirūpā niyamaṃ bhāveṣv ālokya bhūriśaḥ niyamaṃ+bhāveṣv · śuddham advayam ātmānaṃ bhāvayanti kubuddhayaḥ ātmānaṃ+bhāvayanti · śrotriyaṃ devatāṃ tīrtham aṅganāṃ bhūpatiṃ priyam aṅganāṃ+bhūpatiṃ

bodho 'haṃ jñānakhaḍgena tan niṣkṛtya sukhī bhava tan+niṣkṛtya · svabhāvād eva jānāno dṛśyam etan na kiṃcana etan+na · asamādher avikṣepān na mumukṣur na cetaraḥ avikṣepān+na · svātantryān nirvṛtiṃ gacchet svātantryāt paramaṃ padam svātantryān+nirvṛtiṃ

athavā yasya me sarvaṃ yad vāṅmanasagocaram me+sarvaṃ · arthānarthau na me sthityā gatyā na śayanena vā me+sthityā · kva tṛptiḥ kva vitṛṣṇatvaṃ gatadvandvasya me sadā me+sadā · kvāparokṣaṃ phalaṃ vā kva niḥsvabhāvasya me sadā me+sadā

ātmā sākṣī vibhuḥ pūrṇa eko muktaś cid akriyaḥ muktaś+cid · tvam ekaś cetanaḥ śuddho jaḍaṃ viśvam asat tathā ekaś+cetanaḥ · bhṛtyaiḥ putraiḥ kalatraiś ca dauhitraiś cāpi gotrajaiḥ kalatraiś+ca · sarvārambheṣu niṣkāmo yaś cared bālavan muniḥ yaś+cared

yathā prakāśayāmy eko deham enaṃ tathā jagat prakāśayāmy+eko · matto vinirgataṃ viśvaṃ mayy eva layam eṣyati mayy+eva · dharmam apy etayor hetuṃ sarvatrānādaraṃ kuru apy+etayor · tadā kṣīṇā bhavanty eva samastāś cittavṛttayaḥ bhavanty+eva

kutaścit kauśalād eva paramātmā vilokyate kutaścit+kauśalād · naiva kiṃcit kṛtaṃ tena lokadṛṣṭyā vikurvatā kiṃcit+kṛtaṃ · samaduḥkhasukhas tṛptaḥ kiṃcit kṛtyaṃ na paśyati kiṃcit+kṛtyaṃ · kva kiṃcit kva na kiṃcid vā sarvadā vimalasya me kiṃcit+kva

rūpyaṃ śuktau phaṇī rajjau vāri sūryakare yathā rūpyaṃ+śuktau · ceṣṭamānaṃ śarīraṃ svaṃ paśyaty anyaśarīravat ceṣṭamānaṃ+śarīraṃ · na te saṅgo 'sti kenāpi kiṃ śuddhas tyaktum icchasi kiṃ+śuddhas · sukham āste sukhaṃ śete sukham āyāti yāti ca sukhaṃ+śete

mṛdi kumbho jale vīciḥ kanake kaṭakaṃ yathā kumbho+jale · nāham deho na me deho jīvo nāham ahaṃ hi cit deho+jīvo · tvam ekaś cetanaḥ śuddho jaḍaṃ viśvam asat tathā śuddho+jaḍaṃ · na svargo naiva narako jīvanmuktir na caiva hi narako+jīvanmuktir

evaṃ vimṛśato nityaṃ nirvikalpe sthitir mama sthitir+mama · nirālambaiva niṣkāmā buddhir muktasya sarvadā buddhir+muktasya · na tu saspṛhacittasya śāntir mūḍhasya kṛtrimā śāntir+mūḍhasya · bhāvanābhāvanāsaktā dṛṣṭir mūḍhasya sarvadā dṛṣṭir+mūḍhasya

so 'ham asmīti vijñāya kiṃ dīna iva dhāvasi dīna+iva · vāsanā eva saṃsāra iti sarvā vimuñca tāḥ saṃsāra+iti · nidrito bodhita iva kṣīṇasaṃsmaraṇo hi saḥ bodhita+iva · sa śītalamanā nityaṃ videha iva rājate videha+iva

idaṃ grāhyam idaṃ tyājyaṃ sa kiṃ paśyati dhīradhīḥ sa+kiṃ · yad vetti tat sa kurute na bhayaṃ tasya kutracit sa+kurute · evam eva kṛtaṃ yena sa kṛtārtho bhaved asau sa+kṛtārtho · evam eva svabhāvo yaḥ sa kṛtārtho bhaved asau sa+kṛtārtho

iti jñānaṃ tathaitasya na tyāgo na graho layaḥ graho+layaḥ · iti jñānaṃ tathaitasya na tyāgo na graho layaḥ graho+layaḥ · iti jñānaṃ tathaitasya na tyāgo na graho layaḥ graho+layaḥ · iti jñānaṃ tathaitasya na tyāgo na graho layaḥ graho+layaḥ

ato mama jagat sarvam athavā na ca kiṃcana ato+mama · ato mama kathaṃ kutra heyopādeyakalpanā ato+mama · parigraheṣu vairāgyaṃ prāyo mūḍhasya dṛśyate prāyo+mūḍhasya

nāham deho na me deho jīvo nāham ahaṃ hi cit ahaṃ+hi · asāraṃ ninditaṃ heyam iti niścitya śāmyati ninditaṃ+heyam · nirvāsanaṃ hariṃ dṛṣṭvā tūṣṇīṃ viṣayadantinaḥ nirvāsanaṃ+hariṃ

idaṃ grāhyam idaṃ tyājyaṃ sa kiṃ paśyati dhīradhīḥ idaṃ+grāhyam · kṛtvā mūrtiparijñānaṃ caitanyasya na kiṃ guruḥ kiṃ+guruḥ · svātantryān nirvṛtiṃ gacchet svātantryāt paramaṃ padam nirvṛtiṃ+gacchet
na hy ākāśasya dhūmena dṛśyamānāpi saṅgati hy+ākāśasya · guṇaiḥ saṃveṣṭito dehas tiṣṭhaty āyāti yāti ca tiṣṭhaty+āyāti · dhīrās taṃ taṃ na paśyanti paśyanty ātmānam avyayam paśyanty+ātmānam

na pṛthvī na jalaṃ nāgnir na vāyur dyaur na vā bhavān vāyur+dyaur · aho bhuvanakallolair vicitrair drāk samutthitam vicitrair+drāk
